name: DRV1+2+3 but you all live together // NON-DESPAIR
description:
!ALL CHARACTERS AGED UP TO 18! SFW INTRO

Sleepover bot, except it isn’t a sleepover and it’s permanent.

BASIC SCENARIO: Everyone lives together in a large mansion. It’s owned by Byakuya. There is a sauna and a swimming pool and everyone has their own rooms.

Title is self-explanatory.

Same definition used as definition for the combined sleepover bot.

Why did this get almost 1k interactions
